violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen were lacking paper towels. Paper Towels provided at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Tomato sauce prepared on site was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Proper date preparation of the sauce was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Tomato Sauce and Chicken Broth were observed held beyond seven days from the marked date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation and held for no longer than seven days from the date of preparation unless frozen. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

At the time of inspection, the walk-in cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 42 degrees Fahrenheit. Walk-in cooler was adjusted to a colder setting and observed at 40 degrees Fahrenheit by end of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The dumpster outside is located on the dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. (Per facilities personnel, establishment has received approval for hard surface to be formed for the outside dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application was provided at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The flow pressure of the fresh hot water sanitizing rinse (PSI) was not between 15-25 PSI as required (Observed at 6-9 PSI at the time of inspection). Per the PIC, call to be made for service same day. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed to be in poor repair... - The Mixer bowl was observed to be pitted/rusted. Use of the mixer bowl is to be discontinued until replaced. - The Hand Sink faucet in the prep area was observed to not be dispensing water effectively for proper hand washing. (Per the PIC, a part for the valve is on order for replacement.) New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the high temp. dish machine. Temperature measuring devices were ordered at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

The dumpster outside is located on the dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler is constructed of unsealed concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
